summary: Complete Purchase Order system testing - all features working correctly including PO creation, receiving (inventory updates), supplier payments via fund wallets, and sidebar navigation updates
passed_tests: Purchase Order CRUD operations (create, list, receive)
Fund wallet payment system for suppliers
Sidebar navigation shows 'Purchase Orders' and 'Receive Payments'
Purchase Orders page loads with New PO and PO List tabs
PO List displays orders with appropriate Receive/Pay action buttons
Excel-style table layout for line items
Navigation between all sidebar items works
Vendor input and form fields functional
Tab switching between New PO and PO List works
